title: RPLog
description: Log4All. No Chat or Message is save if you use this mod to hold them down until infinity
body:
## LogMod for all those who want to keep their Log Clean This is a Log Mod in which you can create a Key- or Word-list for every Server you like to play on. For each Server it logs the Messages in the Chat History which contains the Keys you set in a menu which is easily accessible via Button in the Config Screen or per ModMenu for an Organized View. This Mod was specifically made for RolePlay-Servers in which you an get a sorted Collection of your Interactions with others. On behalf of some Users I changed it to a more general use case for all Users. This Mod has an Forge and Fabric Version. I try my best to keep both as similar as possible as well as to implement all new features into all backward Versions of Minecraft which are currently online. As the MC Releases go on I probably only going to support the latest of each major Version like 1.16.5 of 1.16, 1.18.2 of 1.18 etc. ### This mod is vanilla Friendly and usable on all Servers ## Introduction: The Mod is rather easy to use. Just click on the RPL Button on the top left in the Pause Menu or via the Config Menu of Forge or Fabric ModMenu Mod. From there you can edit your already existing Servers or your Default Keywords which can also be used in Singleplayer. If you want to add a separate Key list for a Server, simply join the Server and click the AddServer Button. Now you can Access a seperate Key list like your Defaults and edit them. **Be sure to klick Done to save the changes** To access your logs fast I implemented a Open Folder Button which pops open all your Log Folders sorted by Server. The Logs are sorted by date and are zipped for convenient compressed Storage. That's all it takes # FAQ
How does the Mod Work?

- The Mod creates a Keyworldlist for every ServerIP you add in the GUI. When your are on a Server with a saved IP Address in this List, its going to use the Keywords you specified for this Server.

There isnt a release for my Minecrat version

- If you need a newer Version of an older Release: [Contact me](https://discord.gg/V9XcJSSdwB). I can create the Version for the specific Release.

I experienced a bug/crash. What to do?

- Please create a post in [Discord](https://discord.gg/PKd3kxemZs) or create an Issue on [Github](https://github.com/Fireflasher21/RPLog/issues). I'm gonna respond within a timely manner and see to it to fix your problem.

Why doesnt it log my specified Keys?

- There could be multiple reasons for that. One could be, that you edited the wrong Serverlist or the Server changed its IP and therefore cant find your Keys. For further help reach out to me.

How to add more Keys even tho the screen doesnt let me?

- The versions starting with 5.0.0 have this feature implemented
